title: Xzenia Build Charter: Toward the Unheard-Of Threshold
timebox: open-ended until threshold evidence is achieved

operatingDoctrine.principle: No novelty theater. Build only governed capability that compounds under real constraints.
operatingDoctrine.executionRule: Every milestone must reduce drag, increase resilience, or expand governed autonomy with artifact-backed verification.
operatingDoctrine.promotionRule: No frontier is promoted without measured benefit and preserved rollback/control.
operatingDoctrine.blockRule: Any repeatedly reissued but ineligible frontier must be marked blocked and removed from automatic re-selection until evidence changes.
operatingDoctrine.defectRule: Every newly exposed orchestration, measurement, or mutation defect becomes governed work.

thresholdDefinition.description: A substrate that can identify, test, apply, verify, and retain beneficial changes to itself under real-world constraints without losing honesty or control.

frontiers.name: Recursive proof-spine optimization
frontiers.objective: Turn measured cost/fragility surfaces into governed recurring optimization work without looping on blocked items.
definitionOfDone: frontier generator respects blocked and ineligible states
top cost driver can be optimized, rerun, and remeasured in one closed loop
at least two sequential cost frontiers execute without introducing contradictions

frontiers.name: Honest transition from reduced to normal tier
frontiers.objective: Reach normal operating tier through real resource/cadence improvement rather than policy fiction.
definitionOfDone: degradation gate reports tier=normal under honest policy
tier lift remains stable through verification rerun

frontiers.name: Closed-loop governed substrate mutation
frontiers.objective: Advance from isolated proposal execution to repeatable self-improvement with validation, promotion, and retention of beneficial mutations.
definitionOfDone: measured bottleneck can produce a bounded mutation proposal
proposal passes gates A/B/C and is applied or rolled back based on measured effect
beneficial mutation is retained and reappears as improved operating baseline

frontiers.name: Moat through lived substrate integration
frontiers.objective: Convert hard-won runtime lessons into local machinery that is difficult to copy from code alone.
definitionOfDone: at least three repeated lessons are packaged into durable substrate artifacts
new operator value depends on integrated local continuity and governance layers
removing any one core layer measurably reduces system capability

nextExecutionRule: When no ready frontier exists, generate the next one from measured drag, contradiction, failure, or structural opportunity. If a frontier is blocked by honest evidence, mark it blocked and advance the next justified item.
